pi_items.source: Found in task description and hardcoded in export_result.sh EXPECTED_TITLE variable.
Sum of all tiddlers tagged 'Contribution' created in setup_task.sh.
Sum of all tiddlers tagged 'Expense' created in setup_task.sh.
initial_contrib minus initial_exp (6150 - 2450) based on tiddlers from setup_task.sh.
initial_contrib plus the $10,000 DummyContrib added in export_result.sh.
Remains unchanged from initial_exp as no new expenses are added in export_result.sh.
dynamic_contrib minus dynamic_exp (16150 - 2450) based on tiddlers from export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated financial transaction data. The initial contribution total is verified to be 6150, the initial expense total is 2450, leading to an initial net balance of 3700. During evaluation, a dummy 10000 contribution is added, which dynamically changes the contribution total to 16150 and the net balance to 13700, leaving expenses at 2450. The target output tiddler title is confirmed to be 'Financial Summary Report'.
